mapper.select: SELECT oid, uid, recvName, recvPhone, recvProvince, recvCity, recvArea, recvAddress, totalPrice, status, orderTime, payTime, createdUser, createdTime, modifiedUser, modifiedTime FROM t_order WHERE uid = #{uid} ORDER BY oid DESC
SELECT oid, uid, recvName, recvPhone, recvProvince, recvCity, recvArea, recvAddress, totalPrice, status, orderTime, payTime FROM t_order WHERE oid = #{oid}
